title: periglossum macrum
intro: Periglossum macrum, also known as "Periglossum," is a plant species in the family Boraginaceae, native to the tropical forests of Central America and Mexico. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, attributed to the presence of alkaloids and other compounds. The health benefits of Periglossum macrum are believed to include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and supporting immune function, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy. Periglossum macrum is traditionally prepared as an infusion or decoction, and its leaves can be used fresh or dried for herbal teas, tinctures, and topical applications.
